Excellent service and prices. Very clean bathrooms, a pleasant place to relax for a while!

reviews.comment:
Buena gasolinera y bueno el Shop. También funciona una parrilla los fines de semana

(Translated by Google)
Good gas station and good convenience store. They also have a grill open on weekends.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURYNXE2OFdnEAE

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para parar a descansar mientras vas en viaje . Baños exelentes , rica comida y variada . Lugar con mesas  y sillas para descansar . Estacionamiento disponible para autos y motos . Buena atención de los playeros . Lugar de encuentro de hinchas que van en viaje

(Translated by Google)
A great place to stop and rest while traveling. Excellent restrooms, delicious and varied food. Tables and chairs for relaxing. Parking available for cars and motorcycles. Good service from the attendants. A popular meeting place for traveling fans.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURYb3IzQ2FnEAE

reviews.comment:
Parada obligada cada vez que agarro ruta. Buena atención, el salón bien surtido e  impecable, los baños igual.

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop every time I hit the road. Great service, the dining room is well-stocked and spotless, and the restrooms are just as good.
